name: Erannorth Renaissance
short_description: Erannorth Renaissance is a text driven gamebook with sandbox elements. Create your hero, build their party, and shape your journey. Set in an open world, it mixes text based narrative, turn based combat, deep character customization, and sandbox freedom.
detailed_description:
Disclaimer

Erannorth Renaissance is a very text heavy game.

Most interactions, including storytelling, exploration, and dialogue, are delivered through detailed written descriptions and player choices. It is closer to a choose your own adventure or classic gamebook experience than to a traditional RPG. If you are looking for fast paced, visually driven gameplay or brief, one sentence choices, you will likely be disappointed.


About the Game

Erannorth Renaissance is a text driven gamebook with sandbox elements. Create your hero, build their party, and shape your journey. Set in an open world, it mixes text based narrative, turn based combat, deep character customization, and sandbox freedom.

  • Make Your Hero
    Jump right into the action with a pre-built character or create your own. Your origin story is only the beginning. Every choice you make shapes your unique journey.

  • Choices That Matter
    Face ancient vampires or become one. Feed on the innocent or become their champion. Pick pockets, blackmail rivals, attack adventurers, or make the world a safer place by ridding it of supernatural threats and bandits.

  • Highly replayable.

    Unlock 16 different endings, each progressively revealing more of the story, your reality, and the motivations of the various characters.

  • Foremost, a Vampire Story
    While you can play and complete some routes as a mortal, the largest part of the game and the longest routes tell a vampire story. Your story.

  • Explore a Dynamic World
    Step into a living world that evolves with or without you. After the story, play freely in sandbox mode, or jump straight into Sandbox.

  • Social Interactions
    Meet and interact with hundreds of NPCs, each with their own personality and story. Form friendships, rivalries, or even romance partners through an optional dating system. Your romance settings let you tailor the experience to your preferences. You can disable romance entirely, keep things light with casual flirting, or allow more explicit interactions.

  • Exciting Tactical Combat
    Engage in strategic battles on a hex-based grid. Combat is approachable for newcomers yet deep enough to challenge seasoned players. You can change the difficulty at any time to make future encounters easier or harder.

  • Blade and Spell at Your Fingertips
    Master powerful weapons and magical abilities to dominate your battles. As you progress, unlock new skills and perks to shape your hero into a legend of your own making.

  • Customize Your Way
    Enjoy easy-to-use yet deep customization. Choose your party's gear, skills, and tactics exactly the way you like, making each adventure truly your own.

  • Radiant Side Contracts
    Take on endless dynamic quests that react to your actions. These side contracts provide ever-changing opportunities for fame, experience, and loot.

  • Creative Crafting System
    Create tools and items using an expansive crafting system. Experiment with ingredients, rare resources, and special tools to discover recipes or learn them from tomes.

  • Unlimited Modding Possibilities
    Customize and expand the game with full modding support. Whether you are changing character graphics, adding new adventures, or designing entirely new species and combat actions, the built-in tools make modding accessible even if you have never tried it before.

In Erannorth Renaissance, your choices are your legacy. Will you become a beacon of hope in a fracturing world, or will darker ambitions guide your way?

Answer the call and shape your destiny.
